import { NavLink } from "react-router-dom"; const iconStyle = { width: 22, height: 22, verticalAlign: "middle" }; export default function TopNavBar() { return (
({ background: isActive ? "#294286" : "transparent", color: "#fff", borderRadius: 16, padding: "7px 18px", fontWeight: 600, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6, textDecoration: "none", })} > Home
); }
